title: hieracium sparsum subsp. sparsum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. sparsum, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been reported to have medicinal value in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium sparsum subsp. sparsum are often dried and made into infusions, tinctures, or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
